chapter_title.ar: بَابُ اسْتِوَاءِ الْعَمَلِ وَ الْمُدَاوَمَةِ عَلَيْهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 41 – Regularity of the deed and the persistence upon it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/82)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/82)
text: كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( صلوات الله عليه )  يَقُولُ إِنِّي لَأُحِبُّ أَنْ أُدَاوِمَ عَلَى الْعَمَلِ وَ إِنْ قَلَّ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Muawiya Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> having said: ‘Ali<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> was saying: ‘I<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> love to persists upon the (good) deed, and even though it may be little’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from Mu’awiyah ibn ‘Ammar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) would say, ‘I love to continue a good deed even if it is very little.’”
